recommendations.title: Ready to Rumble
recommendations.overview: Two slacker wrestling fans are devastated by the ousting of their favorite character by an unscrupulous promoter.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Score
recommendations.overview: Six high school seniors decide to break into the Princeton Testing Center so they can steal the answers to their upcoming SAT tests and all get perfect scores.

recommendations.title: The Shaggy Dog
recommendations.overview: The tale of a workaholic dad-turned-dog who finds that being man's best friend shows him the most important job - being a great dad.

recommendations.title: Good Burger
recommendations.overview: Two L.A. teens with summer jobs at Good Burger try to save their small restaurant when a corporate giant burger franchise moves in across the street.

recommendations.title: Meet Dave
recommendations.overview: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form. While trying to save their planet, the aliens encounter a new problem, as their ship becomes smitten with an Earth woman.

recommendations.title: Hardball
recommendations.overview: An aimless young man who is scalping tickets, gambling and drinking, agrees to coach a Little League team from the Cabrini Green housing project in Chicago as a condition of getting a loan from a friend.

recommendations.title: Varsity Blues
recommendations.overview: In small-town Texas, high school football is a religion, 17-year-old schoolboys carry the hopes of an entire community onto the gridiron every Friday night. When star quarterback Lance Harbor suffers an injury, the Coyotes are forced to regroup under

recommendations.title: A Thousand Words
recommendations.overview: Jack McCall is a fast-talking literary agent, who can close any deal, any time, any way. He has set his sights on New Age guru Dr. Sinja for his own selfish purposes. But Dr. Sinja is on to him, and Jack’s life comes unglued after a magical Bodhi tre

recommendations.title: Saw: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: This animated comic goes back in time to explore the events that spurred the transformation of mild-mannered John Kramer into the monstrous Jigsaw.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.
